OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Michael Begert; Clerk: SRavinantapricha; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Henry Kwan
Attorney, Monelle Palencia, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Janice Brown, is present.
Attorney Emmie Lam, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-26-2011 is vacated.
Settlement agreement filed in court.
